hero.title: The Standard of Excellence in Real Estate Investment Services
hero.subtitle: One ecosystem. Trusted expertise. Results from capital to completion.

subHero.title: The Birdsey Standard
subHero.description: Building relationships. Bringing discipline to execution. Every Birdsey affiliate operates under the same promise: Quality, Urgency, Accountability, Resilience, Transparency.

items.title: Commercial Mortgage
items.subtitle: Diligence & Underwriting
items.description: Provides a full range of commercial mortgage diligence and underwriting services. With experience in all property types, BGC has provided services on over 60,000 loans representing a loan balance of over $250 Billion.

items.title: Residential Quality Control
items.subtitle: & Due Diligence
items.description: Provides quality control and due diligence services to the residential mortgage market. With a full suite of loan review services we help mortgage originators and buyers manage risk.

items.title: REO Property
items.subtitle: Preservation Services
items.description: Provides commercial and residential REO preservation services. BPS provides a full range of property preservation services to lenders and managers of REO properties throughout the United States.

items.title: Turnkey Residential
items.subtitle: Renovation Contractor
items.description: A turnkey residential renovation contractor with full-time field superintendents in each market to renovate your asset to any finish level, delivering projects on time and on budget.

items.title: Commercial Real Estate
items.subtitle: Debt Products
items.description: Offers a full complement of commercial real estate debt products for commercial real estate owners and investors through a dedicated and direct capital channel.

careers.title: Build Your Career on Trust.
careers.content:
Every Birdsey company shares the same foundation: integrity, precision, and partnership. Whether you're managing assets, building projects, or structuring deals, you're part of something bigger.

Join a team that values precision, partnership, and purpose.

We are always interested in hearing from talented people. Send resume, cover letter, salary requirements and references to:

contact.title: Let's Move Real Estate Forward.
contact.formTitle: Thank you for your interest in Birdsey.
contact.formDescription: Please complete the form below, and we will get back with you as soon as possible.
